overview.description: A top bar component for displaying a product name, logo, and additional actions.
overview.purpose: A top bar component for displaying a product name, logo, and additional actions.
whenToUse: When you need a consistent header area for your application with branding and navigation elements.

examples.basic: <mc-top-bar logosize="auto" product="" productshort="" href="" rel="" target=""></mc-top-bar>

Vue3.basic:
<mc-top-bar
  logosize="compact"
  product="value"
  productshort="value"
  href="value"
  rel="value"
  target="value">
</mc-top-bar>

props.name: logosize
props.description: The size of the logo to render. When set to auto, if a product name is supplied, the logo will be rendered as compact size, otherwise the logo will be rendered as full size.

props.name: product
props.description: The product is the name of your product that will be shown next to the Maersk logo.

props.name: productshort
props.description: The product short name is the name of your product that will be shown in the mobile view next to the Maersk logo.

props.name: href
props.description: Passing a href value will render the logo as a HTML anchor element.

props.name: rel
props.description: The relationship of the linked URL as space-separated link types.

props.name: target
props.description: Where to display the linked URL, as the name for a browsing context (a tab, window, or <iframe>).

slots.description: Use the default slot, when you want to add mega menu or search box.. Check stories under Examples folder to see live example.
Use the actions named slot, when you want to add header actions.. Check stories under Examples folder to see live example.
slots.name: actions

slots.description: Slot where you can drop a router link to the home page in a SPA application.
slots.name: link
